preregistration: README.md in this dir (written before any judge call); issue #224 Stage 1 is the plan of record; ADR 0055 follow-up (iii)
hypothesis: Neutral (ADR 0059): the cross-family grok judge may or may not reproduce the recorded July 8-10 body-effect verdicts; per-verdict judge-robust/judge-fragile classification is the output, any mix is a valid outcome.
generation: NONE — frozen committed outputs re-judged only

judge.passes: grade + uniform prosecutor per cell; met_final = min (ADR 0025)

cost.estimate_revision: pre-grid, from the 2-cell pilot (~$0.065/cell steady-state); recorded per ADR 0066 record-the-gap; PR #219 pre-grid-revision precedent
cost.ceiling_rule: 2x revised estimate (ADR 0073 shape) as a runaway BACKSTOP only — ADR 0066 declines a hard stop on subscription-billed notional judge spend; this run has no generation
